headline: Assessing Stryker (SYK) Valuation As Views Split Between Slight Overvaluation And Modest Undervaluation
summary: Why Stryker (SYK) Is On Investors’ Radar Today Stryker (SYK) has drawn attention after recent trading, with the stock last closing at $332.68. Short term moves include a 1 day return of 1.54% and a 7 day decline of 2.08%. See our latest analysis for Stryker. The recent 1 day share price gain contrasts with a weaker 30 day share price return of a 12.76% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of an 8.65% decline. This suggests momentum has faded after stronger three and five year total...
